programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.desc: A family seeks help after their daughter is physically attacked by a demonic entity; a team is surprised by the intensity of paranormal activity at a historic inn; an investigator encounters the spirit of a long-dead musician in her former home.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.desc: Investigators are attacked by the ghost of a sadistic nurse at an abandoned hospital; a seemingly perfect home harbors an unwelcome guest; a father-daughter team is subjected to a torrent of abuse from the spirits of former inmates.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team; a ghost hunter discovers that a remote island is alive with history; investigators unleash evil while investigating a historic home.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.desc: Jay and Marie investigate Arizona tunnels; the Tolfs investigate a former jail in Michigan; Shannon encounters spirits in a house.

programme.desc: A family seeks help after their daughter is physically attacked by a demonic entity; a team is surprised by the intensity of paranormal activity at a historic inn; an investigator encounters the spirit of a long-dead musician in her former home.

programme.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team; a ghost hunter discovers that a remote island is alive with history; investigators unleash evil while investigating a historic home.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Amy and Adam are the first paranormal investigators to enter Maplecroft, the mansion where Lizzie Borden died; they hope it is a groundbreaking opportunity to speak with the spirit of the alleged ax murderer.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: A North Carolina storekeeper is tormented by a countdown to his demise; a New Orleans teen is trapped in a waking nightmare; an Atlanta police station is the battleground for a serial killer and a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery; a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans; and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house; a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio; a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert; a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator; and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: An Arizona sheepherder hunts down a mysterious beast that killed his wife; a hairy giant stalks a Missouri farmer and his family; a medicine man battles evil spirits who devour human flesh.

programme.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programme.desc: A man uncovers an unholy secret in Kansas; a factory worker confronts the witch he believes cursed him; a Philadelphia secretary is tormented by nightmares foretelling her death.

programme.sub-title: A Shadow Creature in Maine and More

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the alleged curse behind King Tut's tomb explorers' deaths, the Dyatlov Pass incident where 9 hikers died mysteriously and an influencer's disappearance in Nevada desert, investigating potential supernatural links.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates steps into the past to examine unsolved mysteries; featuring the alleged alien abduction of Travis Walton, the bizarre death of American hero Charles Lindbergh's son, and the invisible attacks visited upon CIA operatives in Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests Jack the Ripper's identity, while DNA analysis indicates possible Yeti existence; Max Headroom interrupts live broadcast, surprising everyone.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: In 1590, the settlers of Roanoke vanished without a trace; new evidence finally reveals what happened; archaeologists investigate what destroyed the original Sin City, Sodom; a new theory suggests Stonehenge may be more than it seems.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh examines clues left by the Zodiac Killer, the location of Forrest Fenn's million-dollar buried treasure, and the Voynich Manuscript.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A new study suggests the Shroud of Turin may be authentic, while researchers analyze old ghost photos with new tools; the creator of the Georgia Guidestones is identified.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates conspiracy theories, including new discoveries suggesting the Titanic was sunk by more than just an iceberg, the true story behind the death of Harry Houdini and lost Civil War gold that spawned a lawsuit against the FBI.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates several mysterious tragedies and downfalls; an expedition crew goes insane, turning cannibalistic; an explorer searches for a lost city in the Brazilian rainforest; an aspiring young actress falls victim to a deranged killer.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: The truth about serial killer H.H. Holmes's death may be exposed by one of his descendants; did the government conspire with the mafia about a mysterious helicopter crash?

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the infamous Billy the Kid may have lived to old age under an assumed name; modern scholars explore the true identity of the "Man in the Iron Mask.".

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates looks closely at some of history's most intriguing hoaxes and unexplained events, including the Amityville Horror, the strange fate of a military submarine crew, and a phenomenon in which people's body fat causes them to burn alive.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: The true identity of infamous plane hijacker D.B. Cooper may finally be revealed; the fate of Michael Rockefeller, lost heir to the Rockefeller fortune, is exposed; the car in which James Dean died might not be missing anymore.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Deep in "The Fork," Russell rappels a 700-foot cliff to follow a heat signature; Mireya and Biko track signs outside their base camp; Bryce hears new information about strange vocalizations and discovers that someone has visited his command center.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Mireya and Biko navigate rapids while tracking a possible hunting party; Bryce gains knowledge from fresh prints; Russell creates a trap for Bigfoot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Months after the Northern California expedition, Bryce, Mireya, and Russell head to Washington after a fresh lead points to a target zone where Bigfoot groups are congregating for an unknown reason; Survivalist Biko Wright joins the hunt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: South of a Bigfoot chokepoint in Washington, Russell follows a trail of warning signs into the backcountry; Mireya and Biko track what could be a curious Bigfoot; Bryce speaks with a witness, who wishes he never laid eyes on the cryptid creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
